LeaderboardEntry.title: Leaderboard Entry
LeaderboardEntry.description: A record of a student's test result for the leaderboard.

submissionDate.description: The date and time the test was submitted.

durationMinutes.description: The time taken to complete the test in minutes.

revisionCount.description: The number of revisions made to the essay.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user who submitted the score.

essay.description: The content of the writing submission.

taskType.description: The type of task (Task 1 or Task 2).
